title: [AI5] Fix 'Generate Shopping List' button crash
summary: No first-party shopping-list, grocery, meal, or recipe UI/API surface exists in the TNF repo paths searched. The directive appears to be a low-relevance transcript extraction rather than an actionable TNF bug.

required_inputs: repo path or product surface containing the Generate Shopping List button
reproduction steps or error output for the crash

checks.command: rg -n "shopping list|shopping-list|Generate Shopping|generate.*shopping|shoppingList|ShoppingList|grocery|grocer" -S apps packages src scripts --glob '!apps/external/**' --glob '!**/node_modules/**'
rg --files apps packages src scripts | rg -v '^apps/external/' | rg -i 'shopping|grocery|grocer|meal|recipe'

next_steps: Provide the actual app/repo path for the shopping-list feature if it exists outside this TNF workspace.
Reclassify the AI5 extraction as non-dispatchable if no such product surface exists.
